perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white lace shrug over a black top is standing in the refrigerated section of a Costco. She holds a large transparent tray of sushi and points to it with a wide smile and excited facial expressions. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor dining setting where the woman and another female companion are seated at a table. The sushi tray is open in front of them. (3) Chronological close-up shots highlight the different layers of the California rolls, including salmon, shrimp, and avocado. (4) The women are shown using chopsticks to sample the sushi, nodding enthusiastically and giving thumbs-up gestures to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals in Mandarin open the video with an excited, fast-paced tone. Upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music starts immediately. (2) Ambient supermarket hum is faintly audible but largely suppressed by the loud, clear narration. (3) As the scene moves indoors, two female voices are heard interacting, discussing the price and ingredient quality with frequent exclamations of delight. (4) Cartoonish sound effects (pings and pops) are integrated whenever text graphics appear on screen. The BGM maintains a consistent upbeat tempo until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "最新的" (Latest), "加州捲壽司" (California Roll Sushi), "459元" (459 TWD), "21個" (21 pieces), "每一個是21.8塊" (Each piece is 21.8). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: "好吃到不行" (Extremely delicious), "料真的超多" (So many ingredients!), "我的天!" (Oh my god!), "口感超級棒" (Excellent texture). (3) The tone of the text is highly enthusiastic and designed to hook the viewer's attention with bright colors and variety-show style fonts.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Detailed ingredient breakdown -> Tasting and final verdict at home

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host, 1 female co-host at home, 1 male passer-by in background of store
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat, a black choker, and a white lace shrug over a black sleeveless top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half features Costco's refrigerated food aisles with price tags and shelving. Second half features a modern home interior with a dining table and kitchen cabinets.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Intro -> Benefit/Price Evidence -> Tasting Experience -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and endorse the new California Roll Sushi combo from Costco Taiwan, emphasizing its high cost-performance ratio and ingredient variety to encourage followers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging and price, clear verbal recommendation, and Costco branding.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'kawaii' vlog style with dense colorful text overlays and expressive non-verbal reactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic influencer marketing techniques for food, focusing on 'value for money' and 'unboxing' excitement to drive engagement.
